value: Dropped tdm-ej5ld.2 (install-path) as a blocker on the 5 linter beads (tdm-1j32h, tdm-l5tk1, tdm-h01na, tdm-wa438, tdm-8vbm0) on 2026-05-12. Reasoning: the lint scripts can ship as standalone executables in td-meta/bin/ and be invoked via PATH or full path from other repos; the install-path work is for AUTO-bootstrapping across machines, which is orthogonal to whether the scripts exist. Restore the deps if you want to enforce 'no linters before install path'.
